/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ahfl_target_backends_tests.dir/unit/compiler/backends/target_backends.cpp.o -o ahfl_target_backends_tests  ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_infra_k8s_crd.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_infra_openapi_spec.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_infra_terraform_gen.a ../src/base/support/libahfl_base_support.a ../src/base/json/libahfl_base_json.a
